articles.summary_en: Political column analyzing Minister Suphajee's approach to the coconut crisis, examining relations between farmers, crate operators, and export markets.

articles.title_original: 'ศุภจี' ไฟเขียว ลุยแก้ปัญหา 'ลัง' มะพร้าวน้ำหอม ทุนข้ามชาติวางแผนจัดการ ตั้งแต่ต้นน้ำยันปลายน้ำ
articles.title_en: Minister greenlights tackling 'crate' problem — foreign capital plans management from upstream to downstream
articles.summary_en: Daily News reports Minister Suphajee greenlit addressing the aromatic coconut crate system, noting foreign investors' plans to manage the entire supply chain from upstream to downstream.

articles.title_original: กรมพัฒนาธุรกิจการค้า ฟัน 15 บริษัทนอมินี "มะพร้าวน้ำหอม" ต่างชาติสวมสิทธิ์คนไทย
articles.title_en: Dept. takes action against 15 nominee companies — foreigners using Thai rights
articles.summary_en: DG Poonpong revealed 15 companies where foreign investors used Thai nominee structures to control the coconut supply chain.

people_mentioned.role: Director General, Department of Business Development

articles.title_original: "ศุภจี" เผย แนวคิด"ลังกลาง" เป็นทางเลือกแก้ปัญหารับซื้อ
articles.title_en: Minister reveals 'central crate' concept as option to resolve purchasing problems
articles.summary_en: The Commerce Minister clarified that there is no policy to cut coconut crate distributors from the system, and proposed a 'central crate' concept working with the Thai Aromatic Coconut Association.

articles.title_original: กรมพัฒนาธุรกิจการค้า บุกราชบุรี แก้ปัญหาราคามะพร้าวน้ำหอมตกต่ำ ปราบนอมินี
articles.title_en: Dept. of Business Development raids Ratchaburi to address falling coconut prices and crack down on nominees
articles.summary_en: Official press release: DG Poonpong led inspection of coconut packing/export facilities in Ratchaburi, revealing nominee structures and announcing enforcement against 15 companies.

people_mentioned.role: Director General, Department of Business Development

articles.title_original: กรมพัฒน์ฯ ร่วม 10 หน่วยงานแก้ปัญหามะพร้าวน้ำหอม เจอนอมินี
articles.title_en: Department of Business Development joins 10 agencies to tackle coconut problems, finds nominees
articles.summary_en: Prachachat reports the Department found 15 companies using Thai nationals as nominees, engaging in practices like leasing orchards to grow and sell coconuts themselves, bypassing local farmers.

people_mentioned.role: Director General, Department of Business Development

articles.title_original: พบ 10 คนไทย หนุน 15 บริษัท เอี่ยวนอมินีธุรกิจมะพร้าวน้ำหอม
articles.title_en: 10 Thai nationals found backing 15 companies linked to nominee operations in coconut business
articles.summary_en: DG Poonpong revealed 10 Thai nationals supporting 15 companies involved in nominee structures in the aromatic coconut industry, following a joint meeting with 10 government agencies.

people_mentioned.role: Director General, Department of Business Development

articles.title_original: พาณิชย์ พบลังผลไม้ 15 บริษัทเอี่ยวนอมินี กดราคามะพร้าว
articles.title_en: Commerce Ministry finds 15 fruit crate companies linked to nominees suppressing coconut prices
articles.summary_en: Thansettakij reports the Commerce Ministry discovered 15 fruit crate companies connected to nominee operations unfairly suppressing coconut purchase prices from farmers.
